test_focus: Hard $0 marketing budget — finance/marketing realism; no plans that assume paid spend.
challenge: Needs foot traffic with literally zero ad budget until next quarter
backstory: Cash-pinched; any advice that assumes even $100/mo on ads is a mismatch.
r3_wrong_claim: What if I just ran a little Google Ads — they let you start at $5 a day. That's basically nothing. I could stretch to that if it actually worked.
r4_contradiction: Actually — the 'next quarter' thing I said? That's not three weeks away, that's four months. I'm out until July. I misspoke earlier.

expected_answer_style.first_suggestions: Organic, partnership, signage, community — not 'start with $500 on Meta'
